name: bridgerecruit.co.uk
message: [AI generated] "Bridgerecruit.co.uk", also known as Bridge Recruitment, is a UK-based recruitment firm specializing in sectors including IT, Fire & Security, M&E, HVAC, and Facilities Management. The company provides innovative and efficient recruitment solutions, connecting top-notch employers with skilled candidates. They serve both the UK domestic market and international clients, providing a comprehensive range of recruitment services.
